extension_description.message: Download synchronized lyrics from Suno.com as LRC or SRT files.

popup_status_not_suno.message: Open Suno and choose a song page to start.

popup_status_suno_non_song.message: Open a song detail page whose URL starts with /song/

popup_status_suno_song.message: Song page detected. Download buttons should appear on the cover.

popup_step_3.message: Click LRC or SRT button on the cover

popup_tip.message: LRC · SRT buttons appear automatically on the song cover image

popup_troubleshooting_no_timing.message: Some songs don't have synchronized timing data.

popup_troubleshooting_wait_cover.message: Wait for cover to load, then refresh.

popup_troubleshooting_login.message: Make sure you're logged in to Suno.

popup_troubleshooting_song_page.message: Use song detail pages, not home/create/playlist.
